name: bttour-saas
description: BT TOUR ERP — 인바운드 여행사 전용 통합 정산 SaaS

scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c blue,green "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:api"
scripts.build: npm run db:generate && npm run build:web
scripts.lint: npm run lint:web && npm run lint:api
scripts.typecheck: npm -w @bttour/web run typecheck && npm -w @bttour/api run typecheck
scripts.vercel-build: npm run db:generate && npm run build:web
